title: Recipe For The Musical Comedy Composer:
content:
Librettos of all of the operas,
        Some shears and a bottle of paste,
     Curry the hits of last season,
        Add tumpty-tee tra la to taste.

        - Life.
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Recipe For The Musical Comedy Composer:"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
